description.en: Famous for its unique pink skin, it is the mascot of the 1997 Hong Kong handover.
description.zh: 以其独特的粉红色皮肤闻名，是 1997 年香港回归的吉祥物。

anatomy.en: Adults appear bright pink, which is actually due to blood vessels near the skin surface for cooling down.
anatomy.zh: 成年的白海豚呈现亮粉色，这实际上是皮肤表层下的血管为了散热而显现出的颜色。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are very intelligent and social, living in small pods. They feed on a wide variety of estuarine fish.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们非常聪明且合群，以小群落形式生活。它们以河口地区的多种鱼类为食。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Found in coastal waters of Southeast China, particularly near the Pearl River Estuary.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 分布于中国东南部沿海水域，特别是珠江口附近。
